checks.note: The planned timeline is exactly 60 seconds. Final exported MP4 must be checked in CapCut.
SRT subtitle file is provided. Voiceover can optionally be recorded in CapCut.
Script avoids unverifiable rankings, facilities, admission data, employment rates, and competition claims. Official source URL is listed for department identity.
Student must record or verify all visual/audio materials. CapCut music must be checked before public GitHub upload.
If recognizable people appear, consent is required. Otherwise use hands-only, backs, or non-identifiable campus shots.
Workflow uses mock/stub agent outputs and CapCut editing; no paid API is required.

revision_requests: Before final submission, verify the exported MP4 duration is between 55 and 65 seconds.
Fill in actual self-made assets in outputs/asset_sources.md.
Do not include unofficial logo or claims unless permission/source is confirmed.
